author: m.kalinin
content:
<@602753420033785856> this is interesting https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/issues/5286
Could you please give more detail behind the corresponding change for `update_proposer_boost_root` in Gloas? I.e. the one that doesn't give boost for a block from a non-canonical proposer? This may only happen when dependent root of the head and a new block are different, right?

author: sproul
content: I don’t know exactly why that condition was added, it’s mostly a PITA as far as I can tell 🤣

author: sproul
content: but yeah I agree for it to be relevant the canonical chain needs to have a different decision root to the block being imported

author: sproul
content: (actually that is sufficient but not necessary, the proposer could coincidentally be the same)
